title: GuvFX Market Observation v1
description: Provider-independent schema for a single market-data observation (quote or bar). Carries source and time lineage so research can enforce point-in-time correctness. Assumes no provider, broker, price precision, storage path, or timezone other than the canonical UTC 'Z' representation.

sha256_hex.description: Lowercase hex SHA-256 digest of the immutable raw source object.

schema_version.description: Contract version of this observation record.

record_type.description: Discriminator selecting the quote or bar variant.

instrument_id.description: Provider-independent instrument identifier (e.g. a canonical symbol key).

source_id.description: Identifier of the data source/feed the record came from.

broker_id.description: Broker identity when the observation is broker-scoped; null otherwise.

account_type.description: Account tier the observation is scoped to (e.g. research/paper/live); null when not account-scoped.

observation_time_utc.description: The instant the datum refers to.

source_time_utc.description: Timestamp assigned by the source, if distinct/known; nullable.

received_time_utc.description: Instant GuvFX received the datum; nullable.

ingestion_time_utc.description: Instant the datum was written to the store.

availability_time_utc.description: Instant the datum became usable for research/decisions; must be >= observation_time_utc.

quality_flags.description: Quality/lineage markers (e.g. suspect, quarantined, backfilled). Empty array means none.

raw_object_id.description: Logical reference to the immutable raw source object this record was derived from.

raw_object_sha256.description: SHA-256 of the immutable raw source object.

bid_size.description: Quote variant: size available at the bid; optional/nullable.

ask_size.description: Quote variant: size available at the ask; optional/nullable.

frequency.description: Bar variant: bar frequency/timeframe label (e.g. M1, H1). No timeframe is assumed by this schema.

volume_unit.description: Bar variant: unit of the volume figure; nullable/optional.

then.comment: Quote requires bid/ask and rejects all bar-only fields.
Bar requires OHLC/frequency and rejects all quote-only fields.
